content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit imported and `HMHomeManager()` instantiated in a wallpaper app with no home-automation UI (App/WallpaperGridView.swift:2,5); metadata mentions no home features (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt).
Pierre: Apple restricts HomeKit to apps that provide genuine home-automation functionality, and instantiating HMHomeManager can trigger a HomeKit permission prompt users won't understand in a wallpaper app. Here the manager is created but never used for any home-related feature, which may trigger review questions about entitlement misuse. Remove the HomeKit import and HMHomeManager instance, or add and document a real home-automation feature.
